Thank you for visiting and shopping at Trufairs! We are committed to providing a smooth and transparent shipping experience for our customers. Please review our shipping policy to understand how your order will be processed and shipped.

Estimated Shipping Time Based on Product Weight

Weight Range Estimated Delivery
Less than 50 lbs 7–10 Business Days
51 lbs – 100 lbs 2–4 Weeks
101 lbs and above 4–6 Weeks

Shipping Locations

We currently ship to customers in the United States. However, shipping availability and times may vary depending on your location and the product's supplier. Some products are not available in US Virgin Islands, Hawaii, Alaska, Puerto Rico. Please read carefully before ordering. We may expand overseas shipping in the future.

Processing Time

All orders are processed within 1–2 business days. If we experience a high volume of orders, shipments may be delayed by a few days. Please allow additional time for processing and delivery.

Shipping Time

  • Products shipped from USA and are less than 50lbs usually deliver within 10 days. Shipping carriers for USA are UPS, FedEx, DHL, USPS.
  • Products shipped from China can take 30-45 days depending on product. We are trying our best to give the best possible shipping time.
  • Some products may require 6–8 weeks for delivery, especially heavier items shipped via freight.

Please note: These are estimates. Actual delivery times may vary due to shipping carrier delays or unforeseen events.

Shipping Costs

Shipping costs are included in the price and are based on the item's weight and shipping destination. We offer standard and expedited shipping options where available.

Tracking Your Order

Once your order has been shipped, you will receive a shipping confirmation email with a tracking number and instructions on how to track your package. Please allow 24–48 hours for tracking information to update.

Customs, Duties, and Taxes

Trufairs is not responsible for any customs duties or taxes applied to your order. Any fees imposed during or after shipping (tariffs, taxes, etc.) are the responsibility of the customer.

Delayed or Lost Shipments

If your order is significantly delayed or lost in transit, please contact our support team at sales@trufairs.com. We will work with the shipping carrier to resolve the issue as quickly as possible.

Wrong Address Disclaimer

Please ensure that your shipping address is correct at the time of purchase. We are not responsible for shipments delivered to an incorrect or outdated address. If you realize your address is incorrect after placing an order, please contact us immediately.

Missing or Damaged Items

If your order is missing items or arrives damaged, please contact our support team within 7 days of delivery at sales@trufairs.com. Include your order number and a photo of the damaged product (if applicable), and we will resolve the issue promptly.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about our shipping policy, please contact us at:

sales@trufairs.com

+1-844-833-3267

We would never want you to be unhappy! Please read the following terms prior to returning.

Eligibility for Returns

  • The returned goods/products will be checked with the receipt together and the goods should be in the good condition.
  • You will need to provide a receipt or proof of purchase.
  • The day you receive your order you have 10 days to request a return.
  • You will be responsible for paying for your own shipping costs for returning your item.
  • Some products may be subject to a manufacturer's restocking fee of 20-40%. Usually 20%.

⚠️ Note: Unauthorized returns will not be approved.

Return Process

  1. Send us a request using the form you can find on our Contact Us page.
  2. Approval & Instructions: If Accepted, we will send you a Return Authorization Number (RMA) and Warehouse shipping address or Prepaid label along with instructions.
  3. Packaging: Please indicate the RMA number on your return label or box. It cannot be given without it.
  4. Tracking: We need tracking number for the return before the product ship back.
  5. Inspection & Refund: When the product arrive and inspection favorable, we will refund to your original payment method and generate a Credit Memo for you.

⏳ Please note: We return the money back in due to your bank and/or credit card company policies on refunds.

Buyer's Remorse Returns

If you wish to return an item that is undesired or ordered by mistake, it can be returned for a refund.

  • Request must be made within 10 days of delivery.
  • Product pictures are needed before approval.
  • Buyer pays return shipping and restocking fees (20-40%).

Exceptions - (Things that do not qualify for returns)

We cannot accept returns but can replace damaged item on:

  • Sale items, available to order products or personalized orders.
  • Perishable goods (food, flowers, plants).
  • Toiletries (dermatocological products, hygiena range).
  • Dangerous goods, flammable liquid or gas.
  • Gift cards and sale items.

Damaged, Defective, or Wrong Items

Upon receipt please inspect your order immediately. If you receive a flawed, damaged, or incorrect item, contact us and we will issue an RMA or replace the product.

Refund Notification

We will also notify you of the approval or rejection of your refund. You will be informed if your refund is approved. If a refund is approved, the refunded amount will automatically be credited to your original payment method.

Delayed Refunds

If you've done all of this and you still have not received your refund yet, please visit our Contact Us Page.

For any questions or concerns, please reach out to our support team.

At Trufairs, we believe that luxury living isn't just a concept—it's an art. Founded in 2023 by Jennifer and Arindam, two passionate entrepreneurs from Ohio, our mission is simple: to transform your spaces and elevate your lifestyle. Whether you're drawn to modern minimalism, timeless classics, or the rustic charm of country living, Trufairs offers something uniquely suited to your taste.

Our Vision

Jennifer and Arindam bring a unique mix of expertise and passion to Trufairs. With backgrounds in healthcare, they've always understood the close relationship between well-being and comfort. Their entrepreneurial spirit led them to venture into the world of luxury home décor and furniture. Their vision? To curate a collection of exquisite, hand-picked products that not only enhance your space but also enrich your daily life.

settings.title: Designed for Precision & Everyday Comfort

settings.title: 10X Magnification for Detail Work
settings.description: The powerful 10X magnification allows you to see fine details clearly, making tasks like makeup application, tweezing, and skincare more accurate and controlled.

settings.title: Built-In LED Illumination
settings.description: Integrated LED lighting provides bright, even illumination that reduces shadows and improves visibility, helping you achieve consistent results in any lighting condition.

settings.title: 360° Swivel Rotation
settings.description: The fully rotating mirror head lets you adjust viewing angles effortlessly, ensuring a comfortable position whether you’re standing close or stepping back.

settings.title: Wall-Mounted, Space-Saving Design
settings.description: Secure wall mounting keeps your vanity or bathroom countertop clear while keeping the mirror within easy reach whenever you need it.

settings.title: Designed for Everyday Grooming

settings.headline: Designed for Your Comfort
settings.subheadline: Every detail is thoughtfully crafted to make your life easier and more comfortable.
settings.cta_subtext: Join thousands of happy customers who transformed their space.

settings.question: 1. What magnification does this wall-mounted makeup mirror offer?
settings.answer: This wall-mounted makeup mirror features a powerful 10X magnification that helps you see fine details clearly. It is ideal for close-up tasks such as makeup application, eyebrow grooming, shaving, and detailed skincare routines where precision matters.

settings.question: 2. Does the mirror include built-in LED lighting?
settings.answer: Yes, the mirror is equipped with built-in LED lighting that provides bright and even illumination. This helps reduce shadows and improves visibility, allowing you to achieve more accurate results regardless of the room’s natural lighting.

settings.question: 3. Can the mirror rotate or adjust to different angles?
settings.answer: The mirror features a full 360° swivel rotation, allowing you to adjust it to your preferred viewing angle easily. This flexibility makes it comfortable to use whether you are standing close to the mirror or viewing from a slight distance.

settings.question: 4. Is this makeup mirror suitable for everyday use?
settings.answer: Yes, this mirror is designed for daily grooming and beauty routines. Its sturdy wall-mounted design, clear magnification, and reliable lighting make it practical for consistent everyday use in bathrooms, bedrooms, or vanity areas.

settings.question: 5. Does the wall-mounted design save space?
settings.answer: The wall-mounted installation helps keep countertops and vanity areas clutter-free. When not in use, the mirror can be positioned neatly against the wall, making it a space-efficient solution for smaller or shared spaces.

settings.question: 6. What types of tasks is this mirror best suited for?
settings.answer: This mirror is well-suited for makeup application, shaving, eyebrow shaping, skincare treatments, and other grooming tasks that require close attention to detail. The magnification and lighting support accurate, confident results.

settings.question: 7. Is the mirror easy to install and use?
settings.answer: The mirror is designed for straightforward wall mounting and smooth daily operation. Once installed, it adjusts easily and stays securely in place, providing a reliable and user-friendly grooming tool for everyday routines.
